decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id is route_m34-sbs, which is already the closest match. The registry record route_m34-sbs already includes local_observation_id route_m34_sbs_201110_renamed in its local_observation_ids. No different record is a better match — the M34 renamed to M34 SBS is the same route variant (SBS) on the same 34th Street corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M34 to be renamed M34 SBS
Pre-payment will be introduced at all M34 and M34A stops

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id is route_m16-mentioned, which is already the closest match. The registry record route_m16-mentioned already includes local_observation_id route_m16_renamed_to_m34a_sbs and aggregates this exact evidence. While route_m34a-sbs also references the same real-world route post-renaming (M34A SBS), the observation centers on the M16 identity being renamed, and the base_record_id route_m16-mentioned is the closest canonical home.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M16 to be renamed the M34A SBS for clearer passenger communication

proposed_relations.description: M16 bus route renamed to M34A SBS in November 2011 for clearer passenger communication; same service levels and route.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M16 to be renamed the M34A SBS for clearer passenger communication
Service levels and route will remain the same on both M34 SBS and M34A SBS

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id is route_m34a-sbs, which is already the closest match. The registry record route_m34a-sbs already includes local_observation_id route_m34a_sbs_201110 and the same evidence about the M16-to-M34A-SBS renaming establishing the M34A SBS identity. No different record is a better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M16 to be renamed the M34A SBS
Service levels and route will remain the same on both M34 SBS and M34A SBS

proposed_relations.description: M34 SBS and M34A SBS are sibling Select Bus Service routes sharing the 34th Street corridor; pre-payment introduced at all stops on both routes simultaneously in November 2011.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pre-payment will be introduced at all M34 and M34A stops
Service levels and route will remain the same on both M34 SBS and M34A SBS
